news.title:
India delays coal flexibility plan by a year as solar curbs rise.
Regulators address higher retrofitting costs; NTPC Ltd may be impacted.
news.summary:
India delays coal flexibility plan by a year as solar curbs rise.
Regulators address higher retrofitting costs; NTPC Ltd may be impacted.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd confirms successful redemption and interest payment for ISIN INE733E08254 on 20.03.2026.
Interest payment of ₹111.9 Cr and redemption amount of ₹1500 Cr were made as scheduled.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd confirms successful redemption and interest payment for ISIN INE733E08254 on 20.03.2026.
Interest payment of ₹111.9 Cr and redemption amount of ₹1500 Cr were made as scheduled.

news.title:
NTPC Chairman states gas-based power plants are impractical under current conditions.
West Asia crisis raises concerns over gas availability for low-priority sectors.
news.summary:
NTPC Chairman states gas-based power plants are impractical under current conditions.
West Asia crisis raises concerns over gas availability for low-priority sectors.

news.title:
HDFC Bank CEO addressed chairman's sudden exit; shares fell 5%, down 13% in a month.
NTPC, Tata Elxsi, Nestlé India, and TCS signed MoUs, expanded facilities, and launched initiatives.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank CEO addressed chairman's sudden exit; shares fell 5%, down 13% in a month.
NTPC, Tata Elxsi, Nestlé India, and TCS signed MoUs, expanded facilities, and launched initiatives.

news.title:
NTPC signed MoU with UK's Octopus Energy for renewable energy, EV charging, and digital platforms.
The MoU focuses on clean energy, efficiency, affordability, and innovation across India, UK, and other regions.
news.summary:
NTPC signed MoU with UK's Octopus Energy for renewable energy, EV charging, and digital platforms.
The MoU focuses on clean energy, efficiency, affordability, and innovation across India, UK, and other regions.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd starts commercial operation of 165 MW Khavda-II Solar PV Project.
Total installed capacity reaches 88,709 MW; commercial capacity now at 87,629 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd starts commercial operation of 165 MW Khavda-II Solar PV Project.
Total installed capacity reaches 88,709 MW; commercial capacity now at 87,629 MW.

news.title:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.
news.summary:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.

news.title:
NTPC is highlighted as the leading choice in India's renewable power capacity expansion.
India's power capacity growth is set to rise significantly, driven by renewables.
news.summary:
NTPC is highlighted as the leading choice in India's renewable power capacity expansion.

news.title:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.
news.summary:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.

news.title:
PSU stocks gain attention amid US-Iran war, crude spike; BSE PSU index up 4% YTD, outperforming Sensex (-10%).
Experts highlight strong fundamentals in PSUs like SBI, NTPC, HAL, Coal India, emphasizing dividend yields and sector resilience.
news.summary:
PSU stocks gain attention amid US-Iran war, crude spike; BSE PSU index up 4% YTD, outperforming Sensex (-10%).
Experts highlight strong fundamentals in PSUs like SBI, NTPC, HAL, Coal India, emphasizing dividend yields and sector resilience.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy leads a rise of up to 15% in power stocks.
Main reasons for this surge were analyzed and explained.
news.summary:

news.title:
India plans increased coal use to address summer power demand amid LNG supply disruptions.
Shipping disruptions from U.S.-Israeli-Iran conflict affect LNG exports from key producers.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy declared COD for 91.6 MW of a 250 MW solar project in Andhra Pradesh.
NTPC group’s total installed capacity now stands at 88,274 MW; commercial capacity at 87,194 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy declared COD for 91.6 MW of a 250 MW solar project in Andhra Pradesh.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd confirms interest payment of ₹36.7 Cr for Bonds Series 51B & 51C on 05.03.2026.
The payment was made on time, with no changes to frequency or delays reported.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd confirms interest payment of ₹36.7 Cr for Bonds Series 51B & 51C on 05.03.2026.
The payment was made on time, with no changes to frequency or delays reported.

news.title:
NTPC fined Rs. 5.42 lakh by NSE & BSE for non-compliance on director appointments.
NTPC contests fine, citing Govt. control & delays specific to its status as a Government entity.
news.summary:
NTPC fined Rs. 5.42 lakh by NSE & BSE for non-compliance on director appointments.
NTPC contests fine, citing Govt. control & delays specific to its status as a Government entity.

news.title:

Ceremonial cheque handed to Power Minister Manohar Lal on Feb 25.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.
news.summary:

Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.

news.title:
NTPC and CEA disagree on two-shift operations for thermal power plants.
NTPC opposes operating thermal units below 55% load to avoid RE curtailment.
news.summary:
NTPC and CEA disagree on two-shift operations for thermal power plants.
